'''Fein''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Talon Karrde]]. He was present at the [[Whistler's Whirlpool Tapcafe]] on [[Trogan/Legends|Trogan]], when Karrde called a meeting of smuggler [[Chief/Legends|chiefs]]. Fein fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Troop/Legends|troops]] that attacked the smugglers, and emerged from the battle unscathed.

==Biography==
He was recruited by Karrde from a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TTS" />

==Personality and traits==
Fein was well respected, but not very liked due to his abrasive and cold personality. He rarely spoke to others.<ref name="TTS" />

==Appearances==
